title: The Vanishing of Michael Kuss

scenes.text: A man disappeared following a bizarre series of events, leaving his family perplexed.
Michael Kuss was last seen in Atlanta, Georgia, in 2003.
In the days before his disappearance, strange messages were sent to his friends, raising suspicions.
Despite numerous leads, investigators have not found him or a reason for his disappearance.
scenes.label: STILL MISSING

description: 📍 Atlanta, USA - 2003. Michael Kuss vanished mysteriously, just days after sending strange messages, leaving family and friends desperate for answers. Follow for daily mysteries!
